positive: A minimalist, highly stylized geometric forest landscape scene. The composition features towering, abstracted bioluminescent flora and fauna rendered in clean, solid black shapes against a stark white or midnight blue background. The main subject is a cluster of interlocking, stylized woodland forms, suggesting mystery and depth. Use strong negative space and negative silhouettes to define shapes, giving a 'cutout' poster art feel. The style should be contemporary vector art mixed with Art Deco simplicity. Lighting is ethereal and highly contrasted, emphasizing the glowing edges of the leaves and roots. The overall color palette is limited to deep indigo, neon teal, and charcoal gray, printed flat and boldly. Perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: photorealistic, 3d, blur, noise, text, watermark, low quality, artifact, messy, gradient, gradient background, grainy, extra limbs, bad anatomy
